pi_items.source: setup_task.sh generates fleet_data.json with legal_name field; task description uses 'Great Lakes Freight Lines, Inc.'

pi_items.verified_value: USDOT 1847293 belongs to HERBERT G ASHBECK (operating as ARROWHEAD DISCOUNT TREE SERVICE), not Great Lakes Freight Lines
MC 682041 is INACTIVE in SAFER database; cannot be verified as belonging to Great Lakes Freight
pi_items.source: FMCSA SAFER database lookup at https://safer.fmcsa.dot.gov/query.asp?query_type=queryCarrierSnapshot&query_param=MC_MX&query_string=682041 returned inactive status
verifier.py checks heading1_count >= 7 for full points (lines 78-80); setup_task.sh and task description specify requirement
verifier.py checks heading2_count >= 12 for full points (lines 88-90); setup_task.sh and task description specify requirement
verifier.py checks table_count >= 3 for full points (lines 99-101); task description specifies 'at least 3 data tables'
verifier.py checks paragraph_count >= 30 for full points (lines 137-139); export_result.sh counts all <text:p> elements
verifier.py checks has_toc for 15 points (lines 110-112); export_result.sh checks for 'text:table-of-content' in content.xml
verifier.py checks has_page_numbers for 10 points (lines 117-121); task description specifies 'Page numbers in the footer'

pi_items.verified_value: All 6 terms are represented in fleet_data.json regulatory_references (49 CFR Parts 382, 391, 395, 396, 397); export_result.sh checks for presence of terms in document
pi_items.source: setup_task.sh lines 99-107 show regulatory_references; export_result.sh lines 92-102 search document for these specific regulatory terms

privileged_info_summary: All task requirements for document structure (7 H1 sections, 12 H2 subsections, 3+ tables, Table of Contents, page numbers, 30+ paragraphs) are correctly specified and verifiable. All six regulatory terms from 49 CFR Parts 382, 391, 395, 396, and 397 are present in the source data and searchable in the output document. However, the company identifiers are fabricated: USDOT 1847293 actually belongs to Herbert G Ashbeck (Arrowhead Discount Tree Service) according to FMCSA records, not to Great Lakes Freight Lines; MC number 682041 is inactive in the SAFER database. The company data is entirely synthetic, generated by the setup script.
